checks.description: No held-out task may share an 8-gram sequence with any training task on company+signal date input fields.
TF-IDF cosine similarity between any held-out task input and any training task input must be below 0.85.
All event dates in signal briefs must be anchored to real events before the April 1 2026 cut-off. No synthetic future dates.
Generation model and judge model must be different families (Li et al., 2025).
checks.details: DeepSeek (generation) and Qwen (judge) are different model families. Policy enforced in src/dataset/synthesizer.py via GENERATE_MODEL and JUDGE_MODEL constants.

notes: Held-out partition is stored in tenacious_bench_v0.1/held_out/ which is listed in .gitignore. It was not referenced by any training or evaluation script until the final held-out evaluation pass on Day 6.
